dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S3688 IS: Rural Underpayment Remedy through Adjusted Local Rate Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Sullivan introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Finance

form.official-title: To amend title XVIII of the Social Security Act to increase the floor for the practice expense and work geographic indices for certain areas.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Rural Underpayment Remedy through Adjusted Local Rate Act or the RURAL Rate Act.

section.header: Increase of the floor for practice expense and work geographic indices for certain areas
section.text: Section 1848(e)(1)(G) of the Social Security Act (42 U.S.C. 1395w–4(e)(1)(G)) is amended—

subparagraph.text: by inserting and before January 1, 2026, after January 1, 2009,; and
by inserting a period at the end; and

paragraph.text: by adding at the end the following new sentence: For purposes of payment for services furnished in the State described in the first sentence on or after January 1, 2026, after calculating the practice expense and work geographic indices in clauses (i) and (iii) of subparagraph (A) and in subparagraph (B), the Secretary shall increase either such index to 1.67 if such index would otherwise be less than 1.67..
